name: List Sheets
description: Lists all sheets in a Google Sheets spreadsheet and logs them. A minimal, on-demand example workflow.
shortDescription: A minimal example workflow that lists every sheet in a Google Sheets spreadsheet.
prerequisites: Google Sheets connection with access to the target spreadsheet
idealFor: Developers learning ByteChef who want a minimal Google Sheets example.
steps: List all sheets in the Google Sheets spreadsheet.
